Off Calendar Jun-10-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR. Valerie Papale
Appearances:
Michael J. Mandel, Esq. for Claimant Caroline cosgrove, a minor and Erin Cosgrove guardian ad litem for minor.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Compromise: $15,000.00 Lump sum to be deposited into a blocked account until minor's reaches the age of 18. Blicked account deposited at Wells Fargo Bank, 599 Buckingham Way, SF
Attorney's fees: waived
No fees expenses for costs.
Order approving minor's claim and to deposit money into blocked account signed in open court.
